title: June 2025 Transaction Data
body: "Please note this data shows what HM Land Registry has been able to process during the time period covered and is not necessarily a reflection of market activity.  In June:   HM Land Registry completed 1,883,560 applications to change or query the Land Register  the South East topped the table of regional applications with 422,048   HM Land Registry completed 1,883,560 applications in June compared with 1,817,911 in May 2025 and 1,842,891 last June 2024, of which:    269,147 were applications for register updates compared with 265,402 in May 1,089,639 were applications for an official copy of a register compared with 1,069,738 in May 208,276 were search and hold queries (official searches) compared with 172,964 in May 75,499 were transactions for value compared with 80,298 in May 13,831 were postal applications from non-account holders compared with 13,557 in May   Applications by region and country      Region/country April applications May applications June applications     South East 408,047 412,654 422,048   Greater London 336,247 342,449 349,946   North West 208,094 207,014 214,047   South West 174,721 174,774 181,091   West Midlands 155,674 153,174 161,477   Yorkshire and the Humber 145,196 144,125 151,505   East Midlands 133,700 133,949 141,668   North 90,391 90,354 94,997   East Anglia 77,323 77,428 80,777   Isles of Scilly 53 71 56   Wales 82,370 81,787 85,841   England and Wales (not assigned) 108 132 107   Total 1,811,924 1,817,911 1,883,560     Top 5 local authority areas   June 2025 applications     Top 5 local  authority areas June applications     Birmingham 29,034   City of Westminster 23,825   Leeds 21,395   North Yorkshire 21,296   Buckinghamshire 19,285     Top 5 customers   June 2025 applications     Top 5 customers June applications     Infotrack Limited 211,901   Enact 36,576   O’Neill Patient 32,895   Landmark Information Group Ltd 32,830   Orbital Witness Limited 23,891     Access the full dataset on our Use land and property data service.  Next publication   Transaction Data is published on the 15th working day of each month. The July 2025 data will be published at 11am on Thursday 21 August 2025. "
